---
title: "Mortality_Panel"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Create an empirical storm threat model
```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)

storm_intensity <- 34
begin_year <- 1985 
end_year <- 2022
begin_date <- paste0(begin_year, "-01-01")
end_date <- paste0(end_year, "-12-31")

L <- "https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/data/international-best-track-archive-for-climate-stewardship-ibtracs/v04r00/access/shapefile/IBTrACS.NA.list.v04r00.lines.zip"
  
if(!"IBTrACS.NA.list.v04r00.lines.zip" %in% list.files(here::here("data"))) {
download.file(url = L,
              destfile = here::here("data",
                                    "IBTrACS.NA.list.v04r00.lines.zip"))
unzip(here::here("data", "IBTrACS.NA.list.v04r00.lines.zip"),
      exdir = here::here("data"))
}

Tracks.sf <- st_read(dsn = here::here("data"), 
                     layer = "IBTrACS.NA.list.v04r00.lines") |>
  st_transform(crs = 32616)

Tracks.sf <- Tracks.sf |>
  filter(year >= begin_year & year <= end_year) |>
  filter(USA_WIND >= storm_intensity) |>
  select(SID, SEASON, year, month, day, hour, min,
         NAME, SUBBASIN, ISO_TIME, USA_WIND, USA_PRES, USA_RMW, USA_EYE, USA_ROCI)

Tracks.sf |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  summarize(avgRMW = mean(USA_RMW, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.852,
                   avgEYE = mean(USA_EYE, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.852,
                   avgROCI = mean(USA_ROCI, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.852)

# Fill in missing RMW values. Start with pedigree, then use minimum pressure, and finish again with pedigree
Tracks.sf <- Tracks.sf |>
  group_by(SID) |>  # pedigree
  mutate(USA_RMW = ifelse(is.na(USA_RMW), mean(USA_RMW, na.rm = TRUE), USA_RMW))

Tracks.sf <- Tracks.sf |>
  group_by(USA_PRES) |> # minimum pressure
  mutate(USA_RMW = ifelse(is.na(USA_RMW), mean(USA_RMW, na.rm = TRUE), USA_RMW))

Tracks.sf <- Tracks.sf |>
  group_by(SID) |> # pedigree
  mutate(USA_RMW = ifelse(is.na(USA_RMW), mean(USA_RMW, na.rm = TRUE), USA_RMW))

#Add a buffer to the tracks to make segmented wind swaths
Swaths.sf <- Tracks.sf |>
  st_buffer(dist = Tracks.sf$USA_RMW * 1852) # 1852 converts to meters

# Wind swaths that cross Florida. `USAboundaries` package no longer maintained on CRAN
#devtools::install_github("ropensci/USAboundariesData")
#devtools::install_github("ropensci/USAboundaries", force = TRUE)
#install.packages("USAboundariesData", repos = "https://ropensci.r-universe.dev", type = "source")
Boundaries.sf <- USAboundaries::us_states(resolution = "low", states = "FL") |> 
  st_transform(crs = 32616)

X <- Swaths.sf |>
  st_intersects(Boundaries.sf, sparse = FALSE) #Does the swath intersect the state border?
Swaths.sf <- Swaths.sf[X, ]
Swaths.sf <- Swaths.sf |>
  mutate(Date = lubridate::as_date(ISO_TIME)) #Add a date column

# Extract the boundaries of storm impacts by storm ID. Dissolve the overlap borders of the individual swaths by storm to create a single storm swath. Add the storm category (Saffir-Simpson) based on wind speed
Swaths.sf <- Swaths.sf |>
  group_by(SID) |>
  summarize(Date0 = first(Date),
            NAME = first(NAME),
            Wind = max(USA_WIND),
            geometry = st_union(geometry)) |>
  mutate(Storm_Category = case_when(
    Wind >= 34 & Wind <= 63 ~ 0,
    Wind >= 64 & Wind <= 82 ~ 1,
    Wind >= 83 & Wind <= 95 ~ 2,
    Wind >= 96 & Wind <= 112 ~ 3,
    Wind >= 113 & Wind <= 136 ~ 4,
    Wind >= 137 ~ 5
  ))

# Transform the geometry to a geographic CRS (4326) and unionize the swaths
sf_use_s2(TRUE)

Swaths.sf <- Swaths.sf |>
    st_transform(crs = 4326)
union_Swaths2.sfg <- Swaths.sf |>
  st_union()
```

```{r}
sum(table(Swaths.sf$Storm_Category))
table(Swaths.sf$Storm_Category)
table(lubridate::year(Swaths.sf$Date0))
```

## Expand `Swaths.sf` by adding rows based on the increment value of the attribute `Date0`
```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)

min_lag  <- -8   # days before impact
max_lead <- 8   # days after impact

TIC.sf <- Swaths.sf %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(event_days = list(
    tibble(
      Date     = Date0 + (min_lag:max_lead),
      rel_day  = min_lag:max_lead
    )
  )) %>%
  unnest(event_days) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(
    Date,
    rel_day,
    Storm_Name = NAME,
    Storm_Category
  )

# Create event-time factors
TIC.sf <- TIC.sf %>%
  mutate(
    rel_day_f = factor(rel_day)
  )

# Add month and year indicators change name of the geometry column (this is needed for spatial merges)
TIC.sf <- TIC.sf |>
  mutate(Month = lubridate::month(Date),
         Year = lubridate::year(Date))
storm_months <- unique(TIC.sf$Month)
storm_year_range <- range(TIC.sf$Year)

st_geometry(TIC.sf) <- "geom"
```

## Merge storms with death records
Files received from Jihoon on November 27, 2025 
~ 2 minutes
```{r}
start_time <- Sys.time()
load("data/all_data.Rdata")
load("data/cardio_subset_all.Rdata")
load("data/respir_subset_all.Rdata")

#load("data/injury_subset_all.Rdata")
#load("data/neuropsych_subset_all.Rdata")

#Deaths.df <- neuropsych_subset_all %>% # Use for subsets
#  mutate(Date = as_date(DATE_OF_DEATH)) %>%
#  filter(Date >= as.Date(begin_date)) %>%
#  select(Death_ID = ID, Death_Date = Date, final_lon, final_lat)
  
Deaths.df <- all_data %>% 
 mutate(Date = as_date(DATE_OF_DEATH)) %>%
 filter(Date >= as.Date(begin_date)) %>% 
 transmute(Death_ID = ID, Death_Date = Date, final_lon, final_lat, 
         age = as.integer(COMPUTED_AGE), white = RACE_WHITE, sex = SEX, 
         marital_code = MARITAL_CODE)

Deaths.sf <- Deaths.df %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("final_lon", "final_lat"), crs = 4326)
#rm(all_data, Deaths.df)
Sys.time() - start_time
```

## Filter deaths by date of death and storm effect zones
~ 10 minutes
```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)

start_time <- Sys.time()

target_crs <- 5070
sf_use_s2(FALSE)

# IMPORTANT: set window here
min_lag  <-  -8L
max_lead <-  8L

TIC_proj    <- st_transform(TIC.sf,    target_crs)
Deaths_proj <- st_transform(Deaths.sf, target_crs)

num_obs <- nrow(Deaths_proj)
chunk_size <- 50000
num_chunks <- ceiling(num_obs / chunk_size)
print(paste("Number of chunks to process", num_chunks))

results_list <- vector("list", num_chunks)

for (i in seq(1, num_obs, by = chunk_size)) {
  chunk_index <- (i - 1) / chunk_size + 1
  chunk_indices <- i:min(i + chunk_size - 1, num_obs)

  print(paste("Processing chunk", chunk_index))

  chunk.sf <- Deaths_proj[chunk_indices, ]

  chunk_dates <- unique(chunk.sf$Death_Date)
  TIC_chunk <- TIC_proj %>% filter(Date %in% chunk_dates)

  if (nrow(TIC_chunk) == 0) {
    results_list[[chunk_index]] <- NULL
    gc()
    next
  }

  deaths_joined <- st_join(chunk.sf, TIC_chunk, join = st_within, left = FALSE) %>%
    filter(Date == Death_Date) %>%                 # enforce same-day
    mutate(rel_day = as.integer(rel_day)) %>%
    filter(rel_day >= min_lag, rel_day <= max_lead)

  if (nrow(deaths_joined) == 0) {
    results_list[[chunk_index]] <- NULL
    gc()
    next
  }

  mortality_panel <- deaths_joined %>%
    group_by(Death_ID, Death_Date) %>%
    arrange(abs(rel_day), rel_day) %>%             # tie-break toward pre-impact
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    transmute(
      Death_ID, Death_Date,
      Storm_Name, Storm_Category,
      rel_day,
      rel_day_f = factor(as.character(rel_day), levels = as.character(min_lag:max_lead)),
      age, white, sex, marital_code,
      geometry
    ) %>%
    distinct()

  results_list[[chunk_index]] <- deaths_with_impacts
  gc()
}

mortality_panel <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
Sys.time() - start_time
```

Demographic table only
```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(data.table)
start_time <- Sys.time()

# Often faster for large point-in-polygon workloads in lon/lat
# If you need true spherical geometry, set TRUE instead.
sf_use_s2(FALSE)

#----------------------------
# 1) Build one (constant) impact polygon per storm from rel_day == 0
#    If there happen to be multiple rel_day==0 rows per storm, union them.
#----------------------------
impact_poly <- TIC.sf %>%
  filter(rel_day == 0) %>%
  group_by(Storm_Name) %>%
  summarise(
    impact_date   = min(Date),
    Storm_Category = suppressWarnings(max(Storm_Category, na.rm = TRUE)),
    geom          = st_union(geom),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  st_as_sf(sf_column_name = "geom", crs = st_crs(TIC.sf))

#----------------------------
# 2) CRS alignment
#----------------------------
if (st_crs(Deaths.sf) != st_crs(impact_poly)) {
  Deaths.sf <- st_transform(Deaths.sf, st_crs(impact_poly))
}

#----------------------------
# 3) Prep deaths as a keyed data.table for fast date-range filtering
#    Keep only needed columns to reduce memory footprint.
#----------------------------
Deaths_dt <- as.data.table(Deaths.sf)[
  , .(Death_ID, Death_Date, age, white, sex, geometry)
]
setkey(Deaths_dt, Death_Date)

# 10-year age groups: 0-9, 10-19, ..., 90+
Deaths_dt[, age_group := cut(
  age,
  breaks = c(seq(0, 90, by = 10), Inf),
  right = FALSE,
  include.lowest = TRUE,
  labels = c("0-9","10-19","20-29","30-39","40-49",
             "50-59","60-69","70-79","80-89","90+")
)]

# Race: White vs not (your variable is 'white' == "Y")
Deaths_dt[, race := fifelse(white == "Y", "White", "Non-White")]

# Birth sex (as recorded)
Deaths_dt[, sex_birth := fifelse(is.na(sex) | sex == "", NA_character_, sex)]

#----------------------------
# 4) Helper: summarize one storm
#----------------------------
summarize_one_storm <- function(storm_nm, impact_poly, Deaths_dt, deaths_crs) {

  poly_row <- impact_poly[impact_poly$Storm_Name == storm_nm, ]
  if (nrow(poly_row) == 0L) {
    return(data.table(
      Storm_Name = storm_nm, Storm_Category = NA_real_, impact_date = as.Date(NA),
      total_deaths = 0L, dimension = character(), level = character(),
      n = integer(), prop = numeric()
    ))
  }

  d0 <- poly_row$impact_date[1]
  start_date <- d0 - 8
  end_date   <- d0 + 8

  # Fast temporal filter (17 days)
  dsub <- Deaths_dt[Death_Date >= start_date & Death_Date <= end_date]
  if (nrow(dsub) == 0L) {
    return(data.table(
      Storm_Name = storm_nm,
      Storm_Category = poly_row$Storm_Category[1],
      impact_date = d0,
      total_deaths = 0L,
      dimension = character(), level = character(),
      n = integer(), prop = numeric()
    ))
  }

  # Convert this storm's 17-day deaths subset to sf (usually a few thousand points)
  dsub_sf <- st_as_sf(dsub, sf_column_name = "geometry", crs = deaths_crs)

  # Spatial filter: inside constant impact polygon
  inside <- lengths(st_intersects(dsub_sf, st_geometry(poly_row))) > 0L
  if (!any(inside)) {
    return(data.table(
      Storm_Name = storm_nm,
      Storm_Category = poly_row$Storm_Category[1],
      impact_date = d0,
      total_deaths = 0L,
      dimension = character(), level = character(),
      n = integer(), prop = numeric()
    ))
  }

  hits <- dsub[inside, .(Death_ID, age_group, race, sex_birth)]
  total <- uniqueN(hits$Death_ID)

  # Marginal distributions
  
  out_age <- hits[
  , .(n = .N),
  by = .(level = as.character(age_group))
][, dimension := "age_group"]

out_race <- hits[
  , .(n = .N),
  by = .(level = race)
][, dimension := "race"]

out_sex <- hits[
  , .(n = .N),
  by = .(level = sex_birth)
][, dimension := "sex"]

  out <- rbindlist(list(out_age, out_race, out_sex), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
  out[, `:=`(
    Storm_Name = storm_nm,
    Storm_Category = poly_row$Storm_Category[1],
    impact_date = d0,
    total_deaths = total,
    prop = n / total
  )]

  setcolorder(out, c("Storm_Name","Storm_Category","impact_date","total_deaths",
                     "dimension","level","n","prop"))
  out[]
}

#----------------------------
# 5) Run for all storms
#----------------------------
storms <- sort(unique(impact_poly$Storm_Name))
deaths_crs <- st_crs(impact_poly)

storm_demog <- rbindlist(
  lapply(storms, summarize_one_storm,
         impact_poly = impact_poly,
         Deaths_dt = Deaths_dt,
         deaths_crs = deaths_crs),
  fill = TRUE
)

# Save a tidy output
fwrite(storm_demog, "data/outputs/storm_deaths_demographics_impactpoly_17day.csv")

# Example: view a single storm
storm_demog[Storm_Name == storms[1]][order(dimension, level)]
start_time - Sys.time()
```

Add causal variables
```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(data.table)

sf_use_s2(FALSE)

impact_poly <- TIC.sf %>%
  filter(rel_day == 0) %>%
  group_by(Storm_Name) %>%
  summarise(
    impact_date    = min(Date),
    Storm_Category = suppressWarnings(max(Storm_Category, na.rm = TRUE)),
    geom           = st_union(geom),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  st_as_sf(crs = st_crs(TIC.sf))

Deaths.sf <- st_transform(Deaths.sf, st_crs(impact_poly))

Deaths_dt <- as.data.table(Deaths.sf)[
  , .(Death_ID, Death_Date, age, white, sex, geometry)
]
setkey(Deaths_dt, Death_Date)

Deaths_dt[, age_group := cut(
  age,
  breaks = c(seq(0, 90, 10), Inf),
  right = FALSE,
  include.lowest = TRUE,
  labels = c("0-9","10-19","20-29","30-39","40-49",
             "50-59","60-69","70-79","80-89","90+")
)]

Deaths_dt[, race := fifelse(white == "Y", "White", "Non-White")]
Deaths_dt[, sex_birth := fifelse(is.na(sex) | sex == "", NA_character_, sex)]

cardio_sf <- st_as_sf(
  cardio_subset_all,
  coords = c("final_lon", "final_lat"),
  crs = 4326,
  remove = FALSE
) %>%
  transmute(Death_Date = as.Date(DATE_OF_DEATH),
            geometry) %>%
  st_transform(st_crs(impact_poly))

respir_sf <- st_as_sf(
  respir_subset_all,
  coords = c("final_lon", "final_lat"),
  crs = 4326,
  remove = FALSE
) %>%
  transmute(Death_Date = as.Date(DATE_OF_DEATH),
            geometry) %>%
  st_transform(st_crs(impact_poly))

summarize_one_storm <- function(storm_nm) {

  poly <- impact_poly[impact_poly$Storm_Name == storm_nm, ]
  d0   <- poly$impact_date
  win  <- c(d0 - 8, d0 + 8)

  # ---- all deaths (denominator)
  dsub <- Deaths_dt[Death_Date >= win[1] & Death_Date <= win[2]]
  if (nrow(dsub) == 0) return(NULL)

  dsub_sf <- st_as_sf(dsub, sf_column_name = "geometry",
                      crs = st_crs(impact_poly))

  inside_all <- lengths(st_intersects(dsub_sf, poly)) > 0
  hits_sf <- dsub_sf[inside_all, ]

  total <- nrow(hits_sf)
  if (total == 0) return(NULL)

  # ---- cardiovascular
  cardio_sub <- cardio_sf %>%
    filter(Death_Date >= win[1], Death_Date <= win[2])
  n_cardio <- sum(lengths(st_intersects(cardio_sub, poly)) > 0)

  # ---- respiratory
  respir_sub <- respir_sf %>%
    filter(Death_Date >= win[1], Death_Date <= win[2])
  n_respir <- sum(lengths(st_intersects(respir_sub, poly)) > 0)

  # ---- demographics
  hits_dt <- as.data.table(hits_sf)

  out_age <- hits_dt[
  , .(n = .N),
  by = .(level = age_group)
][, dimension := "age_group"]

out_race <- hits_dt[
  , .(n = .N),
  by = .(level = race)
][, dimension := "race"]

out_sex <- hits_dt[
  , .(n = .N),
  by = .(level = sex_birth)
][, dimension := "sex"]

out_demo <- rbindlist(list(out_age, out_race, out_sex), fill = TRUE)

  out_cause <- data.table(
    dimension = "cause",
    level = c("cardiovascular", "respiratory"),
    n = c(n_cardio, n_respir)
  )

  out <- rbindlist(list(out_demo, out_cause), fill = TRUE)

  out[, `:=`(
    Storm_Name = storm_nm,
    Storm_Category = poly$Storm_Category,
    impact_date = d0,
    total_deaths = total,
    prop = n / total
  )]

  out[]
}

storm_demog <- rbindlist(
  lapply(unique(impact_poly$Storm_Name), summarize_one_storm),
  fill = TRUE
)

fwrite(storm_demog,
       "data/outputs/storm_deaths_demographics_impactpoly_17day.csv")
```

Sanity checks
```{r}
stopifnot(nrow(impact_poly) == length(unique(impact_poly$Storm_Name)))
stopifnot(!any(duplicated(impact_poly$Storm_Name)))
stopifnot(!any(is.na(impact_poly$impact_date)))
stopifnot(all(storm_demog$total_deaths >= 0))
stopifnot(all(is.finite(storm_demog$total_deaths)))

stopifnot(
  all(storm_demog$n <= storm_demog$total_deaths)
)

stopifnot(
  all(storm_demog$prop >= 0 & storm_demog$prop <= 1)
)

storm_demog[
  dimension %in% c("age_group","race","sex"),
  .(prop_sum = sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE)),
  by = .(Storm_Name, dimension)
][, summary(prop_sum)]

storm_demog[
  dimension == "cause",
  stopifnot(all(n <= total_deaths))
]

storm_demog[dimension == "cause",
            summary(prop)]

storm_demog[
  dimension == "cause",
  dcast(.SD, Storm_Name ~ level, value.var = "prop")
][, summary(cardiovascular + respiratory)]
```

```{r}
s <- sample(unique(impact_poly$Storm_Name), 1)

plot(st_geometry(impact_poly[impact_poly$Storm_Name == s, ]),
     main = s)
plot(st_geometry(Deaths.sf), add = TRUE, pch = ".", col = "grey")

test_storm <- storms[1]
storm_demog[Storm_Name == test_storm & dimension == "cause"]

sapply(storms, function(s) {
  d0 <- impact_poly$impact_date[impact_poly$Storm_Name == s]
  length(seq(d0 - 8, d0 + 8, by = "1 day"))
}) |> unique()

storm_demog[
  , .(total_deaths = unique(total_deaths)),
  by = .(Storm_Name, Storm_Category)
][, summary(total_deaths), by = Storm_Category]
```

Write out
```{r}
library(data.table)

# Ensure impact_date is Date
storm_demog[, impact_date := as.Date(impact_date)]

# Order chronologically by storm impact date
setorder(
  storm_demog,
  impact_date,
  Storm_Name,
  dimension,
  level
)

# Write to CSV
fwrite(
  storm_demog,
  "data/outputs/storm_demog_chrono.csv"
)

# Optional: quick check
storm_demog[1:10]
```
